title: Section 83
content: (1) The Chairman or in his absence the Deputy Chairman shall preside at every meeting of the Standing Committee, the 1[Wards Committee] or any other committee of the Corporation. (2) In the absence of the Chairman and the Deputy Chairman from any meeting the members of any such committee shall choose one 2[from amongst the councillors] to preside over the meeting.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 67 of 1993, s. 62, for certain words (w.e.f. 1-10-1993). 2. Subs. by s. 62, ibid., for of their numbers (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)
